code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut have = false
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0

while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(x)
        if not have
          max_val = x
          min_val = x
          have = true
        else
          if x > max_val
            max_val = x
          end
          if x < min_val
            min_val = x
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(x)
    if not have
      max_val = x
      min_val = x
      have = true
    else
      if x > max_val
        max_val = x
      end
      if x < min_val
        min_val = x
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
